3211700.name: mirror insideout
3211700.description:
Do you think a mirror can see other side?

Can you return home safely?

How about this game?

The player name is Kai.
He must escape from a closed house.

Your mother has asked you to go on a mission, but will you be able to fulfill your mission and return home safely?

The story will have various endings depending on your choices.

How to play

Keyboard operation is supported.

W/↑ S/↓ A/← D/→

Z/Enter: Decide　

Esc/X: Menu/Cancel

Shift key: Dash

Ctrl key: Skip message

Some items can be checked in the glowing area.
Some items can be checked even in non-glowing areas.

Items can be checked from the menu.
Some items can be used from the menu.

Play Information

Play time

　Normal clear : about 30 minutes to 1 hour

　Full clear : about 2 hours

Endings

　NORMAL/BAD/? (3 types)

Hints

・Some items can be used from the item column.

・You can also check out items in places that are not lit up.

・If you start a new game after clearing the game....
